datasets.name: ds_stop_dwell_summary
datasets.displayName: Stop Dwell Summary — sched vs actual (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  f.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id) AS stop_name,
  f.route_id,
  f.service_date,
  f.direction_id,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS observation_count,
  ROUND(AVG(f.scheduled_dwell_seconds), 1)              AS avg_scheduled_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(f.actual_dwell_seconds), 1)                 AS avg_actual_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(f.dwell_delta_seconds), 1)                  AS avg_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.dwell_delta_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.actual_dwell_seconds, 0.5), 1) AS p50_actual_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.actual_dwell_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_actual_sec
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact f
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON f.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE f.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND f.actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY f.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id), f.route_id, f.service_date, f.direction_id
HAVING observation_count >= 3
ORDER BY avg_delta_sec DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: ds_top_dwell_stops
datasets.query:
SELECT
  f.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id) AS stop_name,
  f.route_id,
  f.service_date,
  ROUND(AVG(f.dwell_delta_seconds), 1)                     AS avg_dwell_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.actual_dwell_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_actual_sec,
  COUNT(*)                                                 AS observations
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact f
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON f.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE f.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND f.actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
  AND f.dwell_delta_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY f.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id), f.route_id, f.service_date
HAVING observations >= 3
ORDER BY avg_dwell_delta_sec DESC
LIMIT 30

datasets.name: ds_inferred_dwell_summary
datasets.query:
SELECT
  i.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id) AS stop_name,
  i.route_id,
  i.service_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.service_date)                        AS days_observed,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS events,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.5), 0)    AS p50_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.9), 0)    AS p90_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(i.dwell_seconds), 1)                       AS avg_dwell_sec,
  MAX(i.dwell_seconds)                                 AS max_dwell_sec
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred i
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON i.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE i.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY i.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id), i.route_id, i.service_date
HAVING events >= 3
ORDER BY p90_dwell_sec DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: ds_dwell_by_route
datasets.displayName: Avg Dwell Delta by Route (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  service_date,
  direction_id,
  ROUND(AVG(dwell_delta_seconds), 1)                     AS avg_dwell_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(actual_dwell_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_actual_sec,
  SUM(CASE WHEN actual_dwell_seconds > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stops_over_2min,
  COUNT(*)                                               AS total_stops
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY route_id, service_date, direction_id
ORDER BY avg_dwell_delta_sec DESC

datasets.name: ds_dwell_distribution
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  service_date,
  CASE
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 15  THEN '1_fast (0-15s)'
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 30  THEN '2_normal (15-30s)'
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 60  THEN '3_slow (30-60s)'
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 120 THEN '4_high_pax (60-120s)'
    ELSE '5_outlier (120s+)'
  END                                                   AS dwell_bucket,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS stop_events,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY route_id, service_date), 1) AS pct_of_total
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY route_id, service_date, dwell_bucket
ORDER BY route_id, dwell_bucket

widget.name: txt_dwell_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## Stop Dwell Analysis

Benchmarks (TCQSM/Valley Metro): fast=15s, normal=30s, high-pax=45–60s, wheelchair=120s. Delta = actual − scheduled.

**Global filters:** Route ID → Multiple values, Service Date → Date range. Link both filters to all datasets in this dashboard: `ds_stop_dwell_summary`, `ds_top_dwell_stops`, `ds_inferred_dwell_summary`, `ds_dwell_by_route`, `ds_dwell_distribution`. All datasets carry route_id and service_date.

**AVG aggregation reminders:** For percentage Y-axes (pct_of_total), set Lakeview chart aggregation to AVG, not SUM, to avoid double-counting across route/date rows.

**Chart Y axis:** Use `stop_name` instead of `stop_id` for all stop-level bar charts — stop_name is now included via LEFT JOIN to silver_dim_stop (falls back to stop_id when name is absent).

**Note:** High dwell values at Route A/ALEX terminals are expected layover behavior.

**Suggested visualizations:**
- `ds_dwell_distribution` → Pie or bar: dimension=`dwell_bucket`, measure=`stop_events`
- `ds_dwell_by_route` → Bar: x=`route_id`, y=`avg_dwell_delta_sec` + `p90_actual_sec`
- `ds_top_dwell_stops` → Bar: x=`stop_name`, y=`avg_dwell_delta_sec`
- `ds_stop_dwell_summary` → Table (per-stop detail, top 100 by delta)
- `ds_inferred_dwell_summary` → Table (VP-inferred, top 100 by p90)
